name: innotekseo
description: Free CLI to generate llms.txt from markdown files and scaffold GEO-optimised article sites
author: Innotek Solutions Ltd

scripts.copy-templates: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function cp(src,dst){if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){const s=path.join(src,f);const d=path.join(dst,f);if(fs.statSync(s).isDirectory())cp(s,d);else fs.copyFileSync(s,d);}}cp('src/templates','dist/templates');"
